name: Homestyle Zucchini & Tomatoes #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes and reserve any liquid.
2. Choose one vegetable soup mix: Golden Onion or Onion.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Stir in zucchini and diced tomatoes. Cook until zucchini is tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Add the prepared vegetable soup mix, reserved liquid, and basil leaves to the skillet.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for another 10 minutes or until zucchini is tender and sauce slightly thickens.
NOTE: Garlic powder can be substituted for fresh garlic cloves. Microwave Directions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole dish, combine zucchini with diced tomatoes.
2. Stir in the vegetable soup mix, reserved liquid, garlic (or garlic powder), and basil leaves.
3. Cover and microwave at HIGH (Full Power) for 5 minutes.
4. Uncover and continue microwaving for another 4 minutes or until zucchini is tender. Let stand covered for 2 minutes.
